title: SkyblockAxeFix
description: Texture pack that fixes weapons that are supposed to be axes not being axes
body:
Fixes revelant axe weapons that were ruined by the "foraging update" on hypixel skyblock
## Requires [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament)
## HIGHLY RECOMENDED [Firmament Mod Announce Remover](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament-packet-fix)



Relevant weapons fixed:
- Halberd of the Shredded -> Axe of the Shredded
- Daedalus blade -> Daedalus Axe (supports starred, that has a different id for some dumb reason)
- Ragnarock -> Ragnarock Axe 


## Why [Firmament Mod Announce Remover](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament-packet-fix)?
You can check this at the mod's own page explaining why, but TLDR:

- Not normal fabric behavior; 
- privacy breach; 
- Packet too big = server kick; 
- generally unwanted behavior
